hypothesis: On US500 M5 during US cash session (13:30-20:00 UTC), when EMA(20) > EMA(50) > EMA(200) and ADX > 20, a pullback to EMA(20) with RSI(14) crossing back above 45 produces long continuation trades with PF > 2.0 (mirror for shorts).

entry_rules.long: EMA20 > EMA50 > EMA200 AND prior bar low touched or pierced EMA20 AND current bar closes above EMA20 AND RSI(14) crosses up through 45 AND ADX > 20 AND session active.
entry_rules.short: EMA20 < EMA50 < EMA200 AND prior bar high touched or pierced EMA20 AND current bar closes below EMA20 AND RSI(14) crosses down through 55.

exit_rules.trailing_stop: Trail at EMA(20) once 1.5*ATR in profit

notes: Distinct family from breakout/MR; uses stacked EMAs + RSI midline cross instead of band extremes.
